Container.Name: ts6-manager-backend
Container.Overview: TS6 Manager Backend – Web-based management interface for TeamSpeak 6 servers. Requires Frontend container.
Container.Requires: ts6-manager-frontend container must also be running

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Required: Random secret for JWT token signing (min 32 chars). Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: Optional but recommended: AES-256-GCM key for credential encryption. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

Config.Name: Frontend URL
Config.Description: URL where the frontend is reachable (used for CORS)

Config.Name: Backend Port
Config.Description: Internal port the backend listens on

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Stores SQLite database and music files

Config.Name: Backend Port (internal)
Config.Description: Backend API port – only needs to be reachable by the frontend container
